info.english_meaning: to boast to be egoistic to cheat to tear off to powder to speak to talk
info.hindI_arTa: garva karanA durAcArI honA pIsanA kUwanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' kalkanam = damBaH SAWyaM ceti mEtreyaH ' iti mA.DA.vfttiH  ' damBaH katTanaM ca ' iti svAmI  ' kvaTanam ca ' iti puruzakAraH (Slo.47)   ' kaTanam ityanye ' iti sidDAntakOmudI  ' lokaraYjanArTa sADvAcAro damBaH ' iti DAtukAvyam (1.23)
